title: Resolve
body:
# A Handmade RPG in Minecraft
A mod that aims to turn Minecraft into a deep roleplaying game with a focus on choosing roles, working with other players, and exploring a world filled with new discovery.

 ![A divider for the text featuring two weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b49c59901f7e0c3872bf1ed5dd490461c8846b6.png)

## Features
Choose from 4 classes, all with a unique focus - No two classes overlap.
Choose your stats - Build a character that fits your playstle
Explore new biomes, mine new ores, fight new creatures, interact with new NPCs, use new weapons.
Fight new bosses to recover Unique Weapons that roll into different traits, offering dozens of varietal weapons.
20 Levels to choose new abilities, speed boosts, knockback resistance, or health increases, all unique to your class.
Increase your renown among NPCs to unlock unique rewards.
Dozens of quests using Minecraft's advancement feature and through NPC interaction.
Uncover hidden blueprints offering a whole new level of customization to blocks introduced in this mod.
Level up jobs to receive new currencies, trade with new people, and unlock perks that change how you harvest resources.
![A divider for the text featuring two weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f262647b5b7491baa8832502f9defc86702c8dff.png)
## Classes
### Gloomstalker
Harness the power of nature and high speeds.
Receive haste boosts, see through walls, and grow nature around you.
3 New armor sets unique to Gloomstalkers.
2 New weapon types and 1 new trinket giving a choice of playstyle for your class.
### Behemoth
Become a tank, or a glass cannon, utilizing rage to your abilities.
Throw blocks around you, explode, and receive health boosts.
3 New armor sets unique to Behemoths.
2 New weapon types and 1 new trinket giving a choice of playstyle for your class.
### Lost One
Utilize stealth and locate your enemies before they see you.
Run faster than they can catch you, or turn invisible.
2 New armor sets unique to Lost Ones.
2 New weapon types and 1 new trinket giving a choice of playstyle for your class.
### Mystic
Utilize magic and heal those around you.
Find new ores to create wands and staves, or enhance a spear with arcane.
1 New armor set unique to Mystics.
3 New weapon types giving a choice of playstyle for your class.
![A divider for the text featuring two weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f5f6a858c7ba07596b339edafec9f667983e5b2.png)
## Jobs
### Woodcutting
Cut wood and level up your skills to receive unique rewards, along with perks to obtain that will help you cut wood or further the rewards you receive.
### Mining
Mine ore and level your skills to receive unique rewards, along with perks to obtain that will help you mine or further the rewards you receive.
### Herbalism
Harvest plants and level your skills to receive unique rewards, along with perks to obtain that will help you harvest or further the rewards you receive.
